name: unassigned-epic-parent-id
tags: tasks create standalone task no epic parent_id unassigned bug fallback task:ec42e13b
body: The 'Unassigned' epic has task id 96c361de — use it as parent_id when creating a story/task/bug via tasks__create with no natural epic yet, since those issue_types are rejected without a parent. Why: tasks__create enforces epic-or-parent for task/story/bug issue_types; only issue_type=epic (via tasks__create_epic) can be a true root. How to apply: pass parent_id="96c361de" for one-off fixes/tests that don't warrant a new epic; move to a real epic later if the work grows.
